cluster_a.headline: Anthropic's Claude AI can respond with charts, diagrams, and other visuals now

cluster_b.headline: SoftBank-Backed PayPay Shares Jump 14% After $880 Million IPO
cluster_b.top_summary: Shares of PayPay Corp. jumped 14% in its trading debut Thursday after the digital payments firm’s $879.8 million US IPO, the biggest listing for a Japanese company on a US stock exchange in a decade.
